pageContext.name: Bettie Page: Carpe Noctem
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Ozone Productions present the Bettie Page: Carpe Noctem Fine Art Print, a horror fantasy pinup art print by the renowned artist Olivia De Berardinis.  She's the pinup girl of your darkest dreams! Bettie Page is one of Olivia's most frequently painted subjects, embodying femininity and fantasy across the prolific artist's portfolio. This macabre and moody portrait transforms the iconic model into a vampiric vixen shrouded by a cloudy nighttime sky. Page's hypnotic gaze and alluring physique mesmerize onlookers as a pair of bats take wing beside her. Once she has you captivated, the fangs are sure to follow.  Officially licensed and created for Olivia's 2023 art calendar, this spine-chilling scene is available for the first time as a high-end collectible print. Presented as an unframed giclée with deckled hand-torn edges or in a custom framed format, this pinup wall art recreates the original acrylic on wood painting in high-fidelity detail. Each Bettie Page: Carpe Noctem Fine Art Print is hand-signed by Olivia herself and includes her official embossed Seal of Authenticity and a signed Certificate of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 350 pieces.  Seize the night and let the darkness take hold when you bring home the Bettie Page: Carpe Noctem Fine Art Print by Olivia De Berardinis for your collection.
